commands.name: conda
commands.description: Conda 包与环境管理入口

commands.name: conda create
commands.description: 创建新的 Conda 环境

commands.name: conda activate
commands.description: 激活指定 Conda 环境

commands.name: conda deactivate
commands.description: 退出当前 Conda 环境

commands.name: conda list
commands.description: 查看当前环境已安装的包

commands.name: conda env list
commands.description: 列出本机所有 Conda 环境

commands.name: conda env export
commands.description: 导出当前环境依赖定义

commands.name: conda env create
commands.description: 根据 environment.yml 创建环境
